zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Carminow於1346年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir Walter Carminow25歲，母親Alice Tynten22歲。她於1367年與Sir John Willington在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1382年8月22日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Carminow于1346年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir Walter Carminow25岁，母亲Alice Tynten22岁。她于1367年与Sir John Willington在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1382年8月22日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Carminow was born in 1346, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Walter Carminow, was 25 and her mother, Alice Tynten, was 22. She married Sir John Willington in 1367, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 August 1382, in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Carminow est née en 1346, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter Carminow, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Tynten, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Willington en 1367, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1382, à Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Carminow 1346 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Carminow 25 und ihre Mutter Alice Tynten 22. Sie hat 1367 in Cornwall, England Sir John Willington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. August 1382 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Carminow è nata il nel 1346 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Walter Carminow, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice Tynten, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Willington nel 1367, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1382, nel Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Carminowが1346年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Carminowは25歳，母Alice Tyntenは22歳であった。1367年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John Willingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1382年8月22日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサンドハルストで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Carminow(이)가 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Carminow(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Tynten(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John Willington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 샌드후르스트에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Carminow nasceu em 1346, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter Carminow, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tynten, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Willington em 1367, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1382, em Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Carminow родилась в 1346 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Carminow было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tynten, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Willington в 1367 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 августа 1382 г. в местности сэндхурст, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
